title: Tab Switcher Component

statement.markdown:
## Dynamic Tab Switcher Component

Build a custom tab switcher component with active state highlights.

### Requirements:
1. **Active Headers**: Clicking a tab button must add active visual styling (`bg-indigo-600` and `text-white`) and remove it from the inactive tab buttons.
2. **Toggle Content Panels**: Display only the content panel associated with the active tab, and hide all other content panels using the `hidden` class utility.
3. **Keyboard / Event Bindings**: Attach proper standard click handlers on the tab elements.

constraints: Must manage active styles dynamically using JavaScript classList
Must keep only one tab panel visible at a time

starterCode.html:

gradingCriteria.description: Verify clicking tabs correctly switches the visible content panel and updates active state styling of headers.
Verify proper use of dataset attributes, clean loops to reset states, and correct class toggles.
